defaultProvider.description: Provider id used when no provider is selected explicitly.

confirmOverUsd.description: Default cost threshold (USD): a generation run whose estimated cost is at or above this requires explicit confirmation (--yes, or ASSET_GEN_YES=1) before it will run. Overridable per run with --confirm-over or the ASSET_GEN_CONFIRM_OVER env var.

nativeFirstCapabilities.description: Capabilities that a harness-native generator (e.g. Codex $imagegen) can satisfy for free. Resolution order for these is: harness-native if the running harness exposes one, then the paid API provider if a key is set, then procedural placeholders. Only image-shaped capabilities qualify; 3D/audio/video have no harness-native path.

queueBaseUrl.description: Base URL of the provider's async queue API; model ids are appended as path segments.

apiKeyEnv.description: Environment variable holding the API key. Keys are never stored in the repository.

model.description: Default model id for this capability.

alternatives.description: Other model ids worth selecting via --model (e.g. higher fidelity or lower cost).

promptField.description: Name of the input field that carries the text prompt for the default model.

defaults.description: Extra input fields merged into every request for this capability (overridable via --input-json).

estCostUsd.description: Rough cost in USD for one default-model generation of this capability, used to estimate a run and decide whether confirmation is needed. Approximate and provider-catalog-dependent; not billed by the scaffold.
